purpose: Implementation packet built from existing original-source analysis artifacts. This packet reduces repeated source reading; it is not completion evidence by itself.
trustRules: packet rows must preserve sourcePath and sourceLine/label references where available
mapped/classified rows are implementation inputs, not implementation proof
workers may propose patches from packets, but main Codex must review and integrate
runtime tests/traces are still required to claim implementation parity

sourceSnippets.label: EVENT_NEXTDAY
sourceSnippets.text:
4: @EVENT_NEXTDAY
    5: 
    6: ;キャラの素質変更に関わるチェック
    7: REPEAT CHARANUM
    8: 	SIF COUNT == 0
    9: 		CONTINUE
   10: 
   11: 	TARGET = COUNT
   12: 
   13: 	;방뇨経験40以上(【유치】があれば15以上)で【오줌싸개】がつく
   14: 	IF TALENT:57 == 0
   15: 		SIF TALENT:132 && EXP:31 >= 50
   16: 			CALL EVENT_MORASI
   17: 		SIF TALENT:132 == 0 && EXP:31 >= 100
   18: 			CALL EVENT_MORASI
   19: 	ENDIF
   20: 	;반발각인3があり, かつ【유치】か【유리멘탈】である時に
   21: 	IF MARK:3 == 3 && (TALENT:132 || TALENT:134)
   22: 		;욕망が5かつ従順が5かつ마조끼が5かつ이상경험が5以上になると유아퇴행する
   23: 		SIF ABL:11 >= 5 && ABL:10 >= 5 && ABL:21 >= 5 && EXP:50 >= 5
   24: 			CALL EVENT_YOUJI
   25: 
   26: 	;반발각인3があり
   27: 	ELSEIF MARK:3 == 3
   28: 		;욕망が5かつ従順が5かつ마조끼が5かつ露出5と이상경험が7以上に加え【오줌싸개】がつくと【유아퇴행】する	
   29: 		SIF ABL:11 >= 5 && ABL:10 >= 5 && ABL:21 >= 5 && ABL:17 >= 5 && EXP:50 >= 7 && TALENT:57 == 1
   30: 			CALL EVENT_YOUJI
   31: 	ENDIF
   32: 
   33: 	;ストレス비만持ちで부정의 구슬が1000以上でかつ비만でない時に,【비만】に変化
   34: 	IF TALENT:115 == 0
   35: 		SIF TALENT:323 == 1  && JUEL:100 >= 1000
   36: 			CALL EVENT_HIMAN
   37: 	ENDIF
   38: 
   39: 	;ストレス비만持ちで부정의 구슬がなく비만である時に,【비만】から回復
   40: 	IF TALENT:115 == 1
   41: 		SIF TALENT:323 == 1  && JUEL:100 == 0
   42: 			CALL EVENT_YASERU
   43: 	ENDIF
   44: 
   45: ;一応コメントアウト。
   46: ;△進学イベ
   47: ;	;12歳で3月31日を終えた時,【중학생】に進学(【愛】がない場合, 素質は付かない)
   48: ;	IF BASE:9 == 12 && DAY:1 == 3 && DAY:2 == 31
   49: ;		CALL EVENT_JUNIORHIGHSCHOOL
   50: ;	ENDIF
   51: ;	;15歳で3月31日を終えた時,【고등학생】に進学(【愛】がない場合, 素質は付かない)
   52: ;	IF BASE:9 == 15 && DAY:1 == 3 && DAY:2 == 31
   53: ;		CALL EVENT_HIGHSCHOOL
   54: ;	ENDIF
   55: 	;약물중독
   56: 	CALL APHRODISIAC_ADDICT
   57: 
   58: 	COUNT = TARGET
   59: 
   60: REND
   61: 
   62: ;왕도짓코
   63: CALL EVENT_NOROI
   64: 
   65: ;お香の使用回数をクリア
   66: FLAG:61 = 0
   67: 
   68: ;임신発覚
   69: CALL GET_CHILD_ALL
   70: 						;****슬라임パッチ追加ここから****
   71: FOR LOCAL, 0, CHARANUM
   72: 	IF TALENT:LOCAL:153 || TALENT:LOCAL:154 || TALENT:LOCAL:157
   73: 		;出産2日前からは산월突入で調教不可に
   74: 		IF (CFLAG:LOCAL:110 - 2) == DAY
   75: 			DRAWLINE
   76: 			CALL REACH_FULL_TERM(LOCAL)
   77: 		;出産前日には육아室への訪問を問うイベント発生
   78: 		ELSEIF (CFLAG:LOCAL:110 - 1) == DAY
   79: 			DRAWLINE
   80: 			PRINTFORML %CALLNAME:LOCAL%의 출산일이 가까워졌다……
   81: 			DRAWLINE
   82: 		;出産予定日なら出産
   83: 		ELSEIF CFLAG:LOCAL:110 <= DAY && (TALENT:LOCAL:153 || TALENT:LOCAL:157)
   84: 			DRAWLINE
   85: 			C = LOCAL
   86: 			IF TALENT:LOCAL:153
   87: 				CALL CHILD_BIRTH
   88: 			ELSEIF TALENT:LOCAL:157
   89: 				CALL EGG_BIRTH
   90: 			ENDIF
   91: 		;出産20日で親離れで調教可能に
   92: 		;出産20日で親離れで調教可能に
   93: 		ELSEIF (CFLAG:LOCAL:110 + 20) <= DAY && CFLAG:LOCAL:141 != 3
   94: 			C = LOCAL
   95: 			DRAWLINE
   96: 			CALL DEPEARENT
   97: 		ELSEIF (CFLAG:LOCAL:110 + 10) <= DAY && CFLAG:LOCAL:141 == 3
   98: 			C = LOCAL
   99: 			DRAWLINE
  100: 			CALL DEPEARENT
  101: 		ENDIF
  102: 	ENDIF
  103: NEXT
  104: 						;****슬라임パッチ追加ここまで****
  105: 
  106: ;임신・육아 중はサイズが設定されているキャラは成長
  107: REPEAT CHARANUM
  108: 	IF BASE:COUNT:22 >0 && FLAG:38 > 0
  109: 		SIF TALENT:COUNT:153 || TALENT:COUNT:154
  110: 			CALL GROW_3_SIZE_IWS
  111: 	ENDIF
  112: REND
  113: 
  114: ;着衣設定の場合, 汚れた衣類を洗濯する
  115: SIF FLAG:37
  116: 	CALL WASHING_CLOTH
  117: 
  118: ;前回の調教対象がいる場合
  119: IF FLAG:1 > 0
  120: 	TARGET = FLAG:1
  121: ENDIF
  122: 
  123: ;성교중독による夜這いチェック
  124: CALL NIGHT_STALKING_CHECK
  125: 
  126: ;運営費
  127: CALL RUNNING_COST
  128: 
  129: CALL SYSTEM_KIKENBI
  130: 
  131: RETURN 1
  132: ;=================================================
  133: ;朝に起こるイベント
  134: ;=================================================

implementationWorkOrder.recommendedWorkerInput: Use only this packet scope to propose bounded web code/test patches. Do not expand the source scope unless main asks. Do not infer completion from packet inclusion.

implementedEffects.effectId: source effect id from this packet only
implementedEffects.test: test or smoke evidence to add/run, or empty if not yet testable
implementedEffects.notes: short reason the effect is covered

remainingEffects.effectId: source effect id from this packet only
remainingEffects.reason: why not implemented in this patch proposal

requiredPatchReviewQuestions: Which original labels/effects does the patch implement?
Which web feature/domain files are changed?
Which source effects remain unimplemented or require transfer/exclusion?

highRiskRows.reason: FLAG/CFLAG/GLOBAL/TFLAG-like families require semantic aliasing before implementation can be trusted.
Source-effect rows are not implementation evidence, but unclassified/blocked rows identify work that cannot be silently ignored.

implementationWorkOrder.packetAccountingRule: Every sourceEffects.rows effectId must appear exactly once in implementedEffects, remainingEffects, transferredEffects, or excludedEffects in worker output.
